policy_references: Section 1: Lodging capped per night by city tier (Tier 1 NYC: $350/night)
Section 1: Meals capped per day by city tier (Tier 1 NYC: $90/day)
Section 4: Amount exceeding per-night or per-day limit is deducted, remainder approved
explanation: Two lodging nights at $480 each exceed the Tier 1 (New York) cap of $350/night - $130 deducted per night, $260 total lodging deduction. The meal claim of $120 exceeds the $90/day cap - $30 deducted. Misc parking of $20 is within the $25/day cap. All receipts are present and no duplicates detected. The legitimate portion of $920.00 is approved; $180.00 is deducted for policy cap breaches.
